category_sources: Official Joern documentation says Joern is used for vulnerability discovery and static program analysis.
source_facts.description says it is an open-source code analysis platform based on code property graphs.
display_name_sources: Official docs and homepage use Joern.
docs_sources: Official Joern documentation provides overview, quickstart, frontends, and CPG query language reference pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official Joern docs describe code property graphs, taint analysis, search queries, and vulnerability discovery.
source_facts.description identifies a code analysis platform based on code property graphs.
